title: Drillas Server Pack
description:
Drillas Server Pack

Modpack made for a group of friends, bringing easier organization and updates/addons of mods.
body:
# Drillas Pack

Modpack designed on the base of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) for optimal performance, with added quality of life improvement mods.

This modpack was crafted for our Minecraft server,however it is being uploaded for people to use!

Pack is still in developement, so mods might change down the line!

# Included Mods

Included optimization mods are from Fabulously Optimized.

Extra mods:
  - [Right Click Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest)
  - [Toggle Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggle-item-frames)
  - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
  - [Horse Buff](https://modrinth.com/mod/horsebuff)
  - [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns)
  - [Resource Backpack's](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-backpacks)
  - [Vanilla Tweaks Datapacks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
  - And More!

Modpack has Xaero's Minimap and JourneyMap installed, and both are enabled by default. So make sure to disable the one you dont want to use. This was done bacause some players in our server prefer one over the other.

<details>
<summary>Installation Instructions</summary>
Requirements:

- Minecraft Java Edition
- [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app) or a Modrinth compatible launcher of your choice

  
Steps:

- Search for "Drillas Server Pack" within the app. 
- Click on the modpack and select "Install." 
- Launch Minecraft through the Modrinth App and enjoy!

For manual installation or use with other launchers, refer to the [Modrinth Modpack Format](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) documentation.



</details>


# Credits and Permissions

All included mods are used in compliance with their respective licenses. For more information on modpack permissions, refer to Modrinth's [modpack permissions guidelines](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8797527-obtaining-modpack-permissions). However if content in this pack was made or licensed by you, and you like it to be removed, feel free to reach out and we can resolve the issue ASAP.
